title: "You don't have permission to view the integration center... ...please check out owner/admin", But I'm an admin
excerpt: I get this error in my “Car Overview” board. I would like to install some integrations that I made for a client. But when I go to the production board in my clients Monday I get this error. I checked, and I am an owne…

posts.author: Stan (Stan van Weringh)
posts.cookedHtml:
image916×112 9.79 KB

I get this error in my “Car Overview” board. I would like to install some integrations that I made for a client. But when I go to the production board in my clients Monday I get this error. I checked, and I am an owner on the board and also an admin.

Is there a problem with Monday or am I doing something wrong?

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Stan!

This could be due to the type of account you’re in, as not all accounts have access to automations. Please reach out to us at support@monday.com so we can take a look at your account setup.
